name: worktree-warden
description: Enforces worktree-first editing via a PreToolUse gate that blocks main-checkout edits (with a deliberate, time-boxed, per-repo/global opt-out exception), surfaces a repo's git worktrees at session start (configurable), and lands chosen ones into the default branch by deterministic rebase + fast-forward with confidence-gated conflict handling and exact-state rollback. Repo-scoped — never looks cross-repo.
